title: Allison Kreft's New Collection
excerpt: So excited about Allison 's new collaboration with Webster's Pages . Her designs have been some of my favorites for years, and these are no exception. The papers are gorgeous - I had a chance to play with her new…
body:
So excited about Allison's new collaboration with Webster's Pages. Her designs have been some of my favorites for years, and these are no exception.

The papers are gorgeous - I had a chance to play with her new collection, including transparencies! The colors, icons and patterns are perfection. There's plenty of woodgrain, chevron, maps and cameras. Here's how this layout came together.

Other supplies: We Were Here stamp || Journal Thickers || Date Stamp || Scrapperin stamps GIVEWAWAY: For your chance to win a collection pack from Webster's Pages of Allison Kreft's papers and assorted embellishments, leave a comment with your plans for the weekend. Random winner will be drawn on Monday, December 10 at 7am and a winner will be announced shortly after. Winner is #160 - christina rayevich! CONGRATS
